title: Fix duplicate name error with interface initial blocks (#6804)
body:
## Summary

- Fix VMemberMap duplicate declaration error when interfaces contain multiple anonymous nodes
- Add test case for interface with multiple initial blocks

## Description

This fixes the issue described in #6804.

When `VMemberMap::findMember()` is called on an interface containing multiple initial blocks, the `scan()` function iterates through all statements and calls `memberInsert()` for each one. Since initial blocks have empty names `""`, inserting multiple of them causes a "Duplicate declaration of member name: ''" error.

The fix adds a simple check in `memberInsert()` to skip nodes with empty names, since these cannot be looked up by name anyway.

## Test plan

- [x] Added `t_interface_initial` test case with interface containing multiple initial blocks and a method call
- [x] Verified fix with `--lint-only` tests
- [x] Test passes with fix applied

Fixes #6804
